note: Explorer Trinity banner: expand the // TRINITY IS LIVE drop-down with the full Useful Compute stack built across Sprints 5.6 to 5.15 (post-Kalgoorlie). Adds a USEFUL COMPUTE STACK section that lists the 10 sprints, the layer each one ships (SOST AI Orchestrator, Worker, Replay Validator, Governance Gate, Background Daemon, Web Console, Sandboxed Backend Adapters, Benchmark Ledger, Reward Budget Policy, Payment Proposal), the schema or artefact each one emits and a four-panel snapshot (pipeline, safety invariants, conservative caps, backend kinds). Highlights 10 sprints, 13 scripts, 8 strict schemas and 606/606 trinity tests PASS. Carries a clear closing note that the stack stops at Payment Proposal v0.1: no SOST has been paid and no transaction has been signed; next sprints are governance-signed payment flow, Proof Registry / Capsule publishing, distributed job sharding and real DFT/quantum backends behind feature flags. Also re-applies the cosmetic relabel of six PoP-Lottery / PoP Lottery references to DTD Lottery in the address detail view and the lottery audit tooltip (the actual product name; PoP is reserved for the PoPC consensus + DEX surface). Pure UI / documentation update: no logic, no schemas, no consensus, no scripts, no tests touched.
